texto: Abou Ben Adhem (may his tribe increase!) Awoke one night from a deep dream of peace And saw within the moonlight in his room Making it rich and like a lily in bloom An angel writing in a book of gold Exceeding peace had made Ben Adhem bold And to the presence in the room he said - "What writest thou?" The Vision raised its head And with a look made all of sweet accord Answered "The names of those who love the Lord."
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Leigh Hunt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Abou Ben Adhem (may his tribe increase!) Awoke one night from a deep dream of peace And saw withi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, vision, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
